name: Single expatriate - Median income (30% flat-rate)
description: Single expatriate earning €60,000 with 30% income tax exemption (Article 155B)

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with 30% impatrié exemption (Article 155B). Social contributions on full gross (€60k). Taxable income: €31,991.40 (after 30% exemption, CSG, prof exp). Tax on quotient: €2,701.41.
